name: @helixos/desktop
description: HelixOS desktop shell with embedded API sidecar

scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -k -n web,desktop -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix ../web -- -p 3000" "wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:3000 && npm run dev"
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run prepare:resources && npx electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.json
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run prepare:resources && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.json
